anniversary_wine_couple.must_include_guidance: Wineries (Ridge, Thomas Fogarty, Mountain Winery), Bar Crenn, fine dining (Acquerello, Quince, Saison), Madera, allied_arts_cafe. Day shape: cafes -> wine tasting -> lunch -> stroll -> Michelin dinner -> nightcap.

bachelorette_party_crew.must_include_guidance: Cocktail bars, hayes valley shopping, tartine, fishermans wharf, dolores park, late-night spots. Energetic and social.

brazilian_family_visit.must_include_guidance: Iconic SF sights (Alcatraz, fishermans_wharf, golden_gate, lombard), SFMOMA, Pier 39, kid-friendly dinners (Slanted Door, Pizzeria Delfina), ice cream.

budget_couple_roadtrip.must_include_guidance: Lands End, Twin Peaks Hike, Dolores Park picnic, Mission burrito crawl, La Taqueria, Sutro Heights, free outdoor. Avoid any premium picks.

business_traveler_executive.must_include_guidance: Sand Hill VC Tour, Coupa Cafe, Bar Crenn, Madera, Bird Dog, allied_arts_cafe. Stanford-area + SF. Refined dinners. NO long-distance Napa zigzags.

celiac_foodie_explorer.must_include_guidance: Gluten-free-friendly places: Tartine (has gf options), Mission Cheese, Burma Superstar, Slanted Door, casual eateries. Mix in markets + culture.

college_reunion_crew.must_include_guidance: Stanford campus visit, Coupa Cafe (nostalgia), Palo Alto restaurants, group dinners, bars, throwback spots. Pacific Coast Highway scenic.

conference_attendee_networking.must_include_guidance: Sand Hill VC Tour, Stanford campus, Computer History Museum, Coupa Cafe, networking dinners (Bird Dog, Madera). Tight schedule, no leisure detours.

diabetic_wellness_traveler.must_include_guidance: Lands End walks, Ferry Building farmers market, Dolores Park, light meals, salads + grain bowls, hayes valley stroll. Avoid heavy dessert/cocktail focus.

digital_nomad_solo.must_include_guidance: Coupa Cafe (laptop-friendly), Sightglass, Blue Bottle, Computer History Museum, Apple Park, Stanford bookstore, Anderson Collection, indoor work-friendly spots, casual evenings.

elderly_caregiver_couple.must_include_guidance: ONLY mobility_ok=true. Calafia Cafe, Allied Arts Guild gardens, SFMOMA (accessible), Rodin Sculpture Garden, refined indoor dining (Bird Dog, MacArthur Park). NO hikes, NO crowds, NO late nights.

film_festival_critic.must_include_guidance: SFMOMA, Castro/Mission art venues, Anderson Collection, refined dinners, Bar Crenn, Castro Theatre area, cocktail bars. Cultured solo persona.

graduation_family_celebration.must_include_guidance: Stanford campus visit (graduation context), Coupa Cafe, group dinners (Slanted Door, Bird Dog), Palo Alto landmarks, Pier 39, SFMOMA. Family-scale activities.

halal_family_foodie.must_include_guidance: Tamarine, Pizzeria Delfina, fishermans_wharf, casual family restaurants, NO pork-forward or alcohol-centric venues. Burma Superstar (often halal-aware), Slanted Door. Mix culture + family-safe dining.

hiking_buddies_adventure.must_include_guidance: Lands End Trail, Twin Peaks Hike, Mt Tam, Pacifica coast, Sutro Heights, beach hikes, post-hike brewery (Fieldwork), burritos, dolores park.

homeschool_family_stem.must_include_guidance: Computer History Museum, Intel Museum, Tech Interactive San Jose, Chabot Space, Cal Academy of Sciences, Exploratorium, Apple Park, Googleplex Sculpture. Pure STEM tour.

honeymoon_adventure_couple.must_include_guidance: Hikes, Alcatraz, scenic drives, Napa winery splurge, Saison/Bar Crenn for special dinner, Lands End sunset, Twin Peaks night view.

instagram_influencer_creator.must_include_guidance: Golden Gate Bridge viewpoints, painted ladies, hayes valley shopping, tartine queue, Pier 39, photogenic spots, Mission murals, fishermans wharf, Tropicana-style sunset bars.

japanese_business_delegation.must_include_guidance: Apple Park Visitor Center, Computer History Museum, Intel Museum, Sand Hill VC Tour, Coupa Cafe, group sushi/Japanese dinners (try liholiho_yacht_club if available), Stanford campus.

kosher_orthodox_family.must_include_guidance: Avoid pork/shellfish-forward venues. Mission Cheese (vegetarian-friendly), Tartine, Burma Superstar, casual family spots, museums, parks, kid_ok required.

luxury_friend_getaway.must_include_guidance: Napa wineries (Ridge), Madera Michelin, Bar Crenn, Acquerello, Saison, Quince, spa visits. Premium-only picks, no shoestring filler.

luxury_spa_retreat_solo.must_include_guidance: Spa/wellness, gentle walks, scenic gardens, Allied Arts Guild, Madera, refined solo dining, Calafia Cafe, sunset viewpoints. No crowds.

mandarin_speaking_seniors.must_include_guidance: ALL mobility_ok=true. Chinatown, accessible SFMOMA, Pier 39, Calafia, Burma Superstar, casual family dining, gentle walks. Low energy, no hikes.

multigenerational_bay_family.must_include_guidance: Cal Academy of Sciences, Pier 39, Pizzeria Delfina, SFMOMA, fishermans_wharf, allied_arts_cafe, family-style dinners, ice cream stops. Mix of all ages.

music_festival_campers.must_include_guidance: Dolores Park, Mission burrito crawl, taquerias, dive bars, Bi-Rite, Haight-Ashbury vintage, free outdoor music, late-night noodles. Cheap and social.

newborn_parents_getaway.must_include_guidance: Kid_ok=true required. Calm cafes (Calafia, allied_arts_cafe), short scenic walks, SFMOMA, daytime dining (Bird Dog at lunch), no late nights, no bars. Pizzeria Delfina.

remote_work_couple.must_include_guidance: Coupa Cafe (work-friendly), Sightglass, Blue Bottle, Apple Park, Computer History Museum, Stanford bookstore, Anderson Collection. Mid-pace, balanced work/leisure.

retired_wine_couple.must_include_guidance: ALL mobility_ok. Thomas Fogarty Winery, Ridge, allied_arts_cafe, Madera, Bar Crenn at early seating, scenic drives, no hiking, refined indoor dining.

sales_rep_wine_region.must_include_guidance: Napa/Sonoma wineries, wine bars, Madera, Bar Crenn, Bird Dog. Solo wine-focused business traveler. NO crowds.

severe_allergy_family.must_include_guidance: Kid_ok required. Allergy-aware restaurants (chain pizza, simple grills), Pizzeria Delfina, Cal Academy, Pier 39, SFMOMA. Avoid Asian/desert-heavy menus where cross-contamination risk.

solo_woman_nature_retreat.must_include_guidance: Lands End Trail, Sutro Heights, Mt Tam, Twin Peaks, Anderson Collection, casual cafes, Pizzeria Delfina, Bi-Rite. Solo wandering pace.

sports_fan_game_weekend.must_include_guidance: Game day prep, Oracle Park visits, sports bars, beer gardens (Fieldwork, Zeitgeist), burgers, Pier 39, downtown SF. Group/social energy.

startup_founder_pitch_tour.must_include_guidance: Sand Hill VC Tour, Coupa Cafe (every morning!), Stanford bookstore, Computer History Museum, Apple Park, networking dinners at Madera/Bird Dog, late cocktails Bar Crenn.

tech_curious_couple.must_include_guidance: MUST INCLUDE in 80%+ of itineraries: Apple Park Visitor Center, Computer History Museum, Intel Museum, Tech Interactive San Jose, Coupa Cafe, Googleplex Sculpture Loop, Sand Hill VC Tour, Anderson Collection. Plus Bar Crenn / Bird Dog / Madera for refined dinners.

van_lifer_couple.must_include_guidance: Lands End, Mt Tam, beach campsites, taquerias, Mission burritos, Dolores Park, free outdoor everything. Pacifica.

vision_impaired_adventure.must_include_guidance: Tactile/sensory activities: Cal Academy hands-on, wineries, food tours, scenic touch-based experiences, audio-described tours. Pizzeria Delfina, casual dining.

wedding_guest_casual.must_include_guidance: Mix sightseeing + foodie. Tartine, Burma Superstar, Pier 39, SFMOMA, hayes_valley_stroll, casual dinners, ice cream. Easy-going.

wedding_party_weekend.must_include_guidance: Group dinners (Bird Dog, Slanted Door, Liholiho), bar_crenn_cocktails, Allied Arts garden brunch, group walks Hayes Valley. Pre-wedding wine tasting. Social, premium energy.

wheelchair_accessible_traveler.must_include_guidance: STRICT mobility_ok=true. Calafia Cafe, SFMOMA (accessible), Anderson Collection, Hayes Valley stroll (paved), Bird Dog, Mission Cheese. No hikes, no cobblestone areas, no stairs.

young_family_outdoorsy.must_include_guidance: Kid_ok required. Dolores Park, Cal Academy, Pier 39, Pizzeria Delfina, Bi-Rite Creamery, Lands End (stroller-friendly), gentle walks, Burma Superstar (kid-friendly).
